_bind_address_comment: 0.0.0.0 for public access, 127.0.0.1 for local only
_max_connections_comment: Maximum concurrent connections (5 for embedded Linux, 10+ for desktop)
_enable_cors_comment: Enable CORS for development (false for production)
_enable_auth_comment: Enable password protection (true for public access, false for local network)
_jwt_secret_comment: JWT secret key (null = auto-generate, or set your own)
_serve_static_files_comment: Serve static files from disk (false = use embedded files)
_static_files_dir_comment: Static files directory (null = use embedded, or './web/dist' for dev)
